summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Celebrity Buzz Index fantasy league platform. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate) with AI news generation functional. Critical frontend UI bug prevents core team building functionality.

minor_issues.issue: Category detection inconsistent - Taylor Swift categorized as movie_stars instead of musicians
minor_issues.impact: Celebrities may appear in wrong categories

ui_bugs.issue: News panel hover overlay blocks 'Add to Team' button clicks - pointer events intercepted
ui_bugs.impact: Users cannot add celebrities to teams - core functionality broken

integration_issues.issue: TV Actors and Musicians categories don't load celebrities when clicked
integration_issues.impact: Users cannot browse celebrities by category

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix news panel overlay blocking Add to Team button clicks. The .news-panel hover effect prevents users from adding celebrities to teams. Also fix category loading for TV Actors and Musicians categories. Backend is fully functional.
